rationale: regenerateProtectMcpHooks decision rule: clobber iff /protect-mcp (evaluate|sign)/ matches. L0.audit-1 covers both branches in one test: a hooks.json containing `npx protect-mcp evaluate` (OBSOLETE pattern) → clobbered to {hooks:{}}; a hooks.json containing `protect-mcp-v2 verify` (no obsolete keywords) → preserved (PreToolUse remains defined). Mutations equivalent to flipping the regex (e.g. dropping `evaluate|`, dropping `\b`, removing the `!` in `if (!OBSOLETE.test(...))`) would all fail L0.audit-1. The test is a 2-branch covering pair which kills every meaningful predicate mutation.
